title: AvailabilityRequest
description: The persisted form of a request to make a workflow version available in an environment (design §7.8): the target workflow version and environment, the requesting actor, the decision state, and audit/optimistic-concurrency metadata. Governed by the target environment's administrators. Backends store this document verbatim; it is congruent with the API's AvailabilityRequestView.

baseWorkflowId.description: The base workflow id whose version the request targets.

versionNumber.description: The version number to make available.

environment.description: The target environment; approval routes to this environment's administrators (design §7.7).

reason.description: An optional justification supplied with the request.

createdBy.description: The actor (the requester) that created the request; the 'mine' list filter keys on it.

decidedBy.description: The actor (an environment administrator, or the requester for a withdrawal) that decided the request, if decided.

decidedAt.description: When the request was decided, if decided.

decisionReason.description: An optional note recorded with the decision.
